pageTitle: Aquarium Substrate Calculator: How Much Gravel, Sand, or Soil Do You Need?
pageDescription: Use this aquarium substrate calculator to instantly determine the exact volume and weight of substrate your aquarium requires. Free aquarium gravel calculator, aquarium sand calculator, and planted aquarium substrate calculator for all tank sizes.
calculatorDescription: Calculate gravel, sand, or aquasoil volume, weight, bags, and estimated cost for your tank
